title: ONGOING INVESTIGATION ALERT: The Schall Law Firm Announces it is Investigating Claims Against Fidelity National Information Services, Inc. and Encourages Investors with Losses to Contact the Firm
text: LOS ANGELES, CA / ACCESSWIRE / June 30, 2023 / The Schall Law Firm, a national shareholder rights litigation firm, announces that it is investigating claims on behalf of investors of Fidelity National Information Services, Inc. ("Fidelity National" or "the Company") (NYSE:FIS) for violations of the securities laws. The investigation focuses on whether the Company issued false and/or misleading statements and/or failed to disclose information pertinent to investors.

title: Bitcoin slips after SEC reportedly calls ETF filings inadequate, but still heads for a winning month
text: Bitcoin slipped after the SEC reportedly called recent spot bitcoin ETF filings inadequate.

title: INVESTIGATION REMINDER: The Schall Law Firm Announces it is Investigating Claims Against Fidelity National Information Services, Inc. and Encourages Investors with Losses to Contact the Firm

title: Fidelity National Information Services: A Fair Yield And A Fair Price
text: Fidelity National Information Services has strong fundamentals but has experienced a significant pullback due to issues with its Worldpay acquisition. New management is focusing on cost-cutting and operational streamlining, which should boost results and stabilize the stock price. Selling put options on FIS presents an attractive strategy to capitalize on the current market situation, with a high probability of success and immediate cash-on-cash return to investors.

title: Report: FIS Acquires Bond Financial Technologies to Grow Embedded Finance
text: FinTech giant FIS has reportedly acquired embedded finance startup Bond Financial Technologies. TechCrunch reported Friday (June 9) that unnamed sources confirmed the acquisition after Fintech Business Weekly's Jason Mikula broke the news in a June 1 tweet.

title: The 3 Most Undervalued Tech Stocks for Your June Buy List
text: The market is on a winning streak lately, with growth companies leading the way. This has reduced the number of undervalued tech stocks out there, no doubt.

title: Fidelity (FIS) and Volt Unite to Adopt A2A Payment Method
text: Fidelity (FIS) partners with Volt, an open payments getaway, to integrate account-to-account payment infrastructure in Worldpay.

title: Worldpay from FIS teams up with Volt to Bring Power of Open Banking to Merchants
text: JACKSONVILLE, Fla.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Global financial technology leader FIS® (NYSE: FIS) has today announced a new collaboration between its merchant solutions business, Worldpay from FIS, and Volt, an open payments gateway. The collaboration, announced at Money 20/20 Europe, will bring the power of open banking to merchants and give them the ability to take payment through open banking from consumers. Adoption of open banking technology is continuing to grow worldwide, driving account-to-accou.

title: Fidelity (FIS) and Affirm Unite to Drive Merchant Revenues
text: Fidelity (FIS) partners with Affirm to integrate Adaptive Checkout in the former's Worldpay, thus enhancing its existing offerings.
